title: FHSS The Minor Program Application Results

FHSS The Minor Program Application Results

FHSS The Minor Program Application Results

Dear Students,

The minor program application results for the Spring semester of the 2025-2026 Academic Year have been announced. You can check your application status using your Identity Number. Registrations will be held at the Department of Student Affairs between

February 25 and March 2

.
